commit_scope: Teach the fourth-arm lowering and emitted fkwu walker a distinct native record carrier, then admit record-field-access to the fourth-arm manifest.

commands: coord claim fourth residual record/native cluster: inspect and, if bounded, teach fkwu record_new/get/set/has/keys/record? parity; avoid socket IO, BML class construction/dispatch, and broad substrate intern_node/bp rewrites unless required
local_validation.notes: Focused record-field-access validates four-way at 16. The focused gate returns PASS-4WAY record-field-access. Full Form validation returns 'fourth arm: 139 band(s) four-way' and '559 ok, 0 divergent'. The refreshed fourth-arm survey reports 139 in-manifest, 31 single-pass, 33 bml-pass, 27 multi-pass, 28 single-mismatch, 7 multi-mismatch, and 2 bml-mismatch. Fresh gap analysis leaves make_nodeid, bp, intern_node, intern_trivial_int/string, node_eq, node_children, node_value, and socket families as the larger residual blockers; record_new/get drop to 3 blocked bands and record_has/record?/record_blueprint each appear in one residual band.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet. GitHub checks will be monitored after PR creation.

deploy_validation.summary: No deployment triggered by this commit. Android validation is local Form-native metal-plane/object evidence, not proof of an APK-shipped clang binary.

phase_gate.gate: Record field access must pass Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with a distinct fourth-arm record carrier.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue to the next non-overlapping fourth-arm residual: node/substrate vocabulary reconciliation or the remaining list-of-record mismatch. Separate follow-on: move model_executor_runs JSONL into a native substrate proof-run ledger with JSONL kept as export/cache, reducing append-only merge conflicts while preserving the existing evidence contract.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The fourth-arm fkwu walker now represents records as negative-even record-table carriers initialized from packed record_new entries, so record?, record_get, record_has, and record_keys no longer alias integers, lists, nodes, or float boxes.
test_flows: record-field-access validates four-way at 16 and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
record-fold remains four-way at 31 after the carrier change.
Full form validate.sh reports 139 fourth-arm bands and 559 ok / 0 divergent across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and covered fkwu bands.
Metal-plane audit reports macOS arm64 Mach-O objects and Android arm64 ELF relocatable objects for bml-hati, form-jit, and form-jit-lowered.
e2e_validation.summary: The record/native cluster moved one bounded floor row. Android remains at the Form-native recipe/table and generated ELF evidence floor unless a future APK-bundled compiler binary is proven separately.
